title: cyanus triumfettii subsp. adscendens
intro: Cyanus triumfettii subsp. adscendens, also known as the Cornflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cornflower include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions like eczema and acne. Cornflower can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
